Use Cases

Who uses ResearchReach

Four distinct buyer types — all with the same problem: finding and reaching the right scientists.

🧬

Pharma & Biotech Outreach

BD teams · KOL programs · Medical affairs · CRO sourcing

The persona

A business development lead at a mid-size biotech needs to build a list of 50 KOLs in GLP-1 receptor research. She knows roughly who the key academic players are — but getting verified contact details, understanding their industry ties, and knowing which ones are actually receptive to outreach takes weeks.

How ResearchReach helps

  • ✓ Search by therapeutic area and active grant funding
  • ✓ Filter by industry co-authorships and clinical trial affiliations
  • ✓ Export verified institutional emails and ORCID profiles
  • ✓ See patent filings to identify IP-generating researchers
  • ✓ Track conference appearances for event-based outreach

"We used to spend 3 weeks building KOL lists from scratch. With a tool like this, we could have that list ready in an afternoon — and actually know who has industry ties vs. pure academics."

— Pharma BD Lead, waitlist member

🖥️

Scientific Software Sales

ELN vendors · LIMS · Research platforms · Lab automation

The persona

An AE at a lab software company (think: Benchling, Dotmatics, SciNote) is trying to grow their academic customer base. They need to reach lab managers and PIs running wet labs in their target verticals — but "researcher" isn't a job title that shows up in ZoomInfo.

How ResearchReach helps

  • ✓ Segment by research methodology (wet lab, computational, clinical)
  • ✓ Filter by lab size proxy (number of co-authors, grad student volume)
  • ✓ Target by NIH grant amount (budget signal for software spend)
  • ✓ Find researchers who already publish with competitor software cited
  • ✓ CRM sync via API or direct CSV export
🔬

Deep Tech Recruiting

Biotech startups · Semicon firms · Defense tech · Quantum computing

The persona

A technical recruiter at a quantum computing startup needs to hire 3 research scientists with background in superconducting qubits. LinkedIn searches return zero relevant results. PhD job boards are passive. The best candidates are still publishing from university labs.

How ResearchReach helps

  • ✓ Find researchers by publication topic and methodology keyword
  • ✓ Filter by industry bridge signals (startup affiliation, patent filings)
  • ✓ Identify PhD candidates and postdocs within 12 months of graduation
  • ✓ Track researchers who've transitioned from academia to industry before
  • ✓ H-index and citation count as research quality signals
💰

VC & Deal Sourcing

Life sciences funds · Deep tech VCs · University tech transfer

The persona

A partner at a life sciences VC wants to monitor emerging research in CRISPR-based therapeutics before companies spin out of universities. They want to identify the PIs most likely to found companies — before they're on anyone's cap table.

How ResearchReach helps

  • ✓ Track patent filing velocity by researcher and institution
  • ✓ Monitor NIH SBIR/STTR grants (the pre-spinout signal)
  • ✓ Alert on new publications in your thesis areas
  • ✓ Identify researchers with multiple patents + startup experience
  • ✓ Export co-author networks to map scientific communities

Ready to find the right scientists?

Join the waitlist. Tell us your use case and we'll prioritize your onboarding.

No spam. GDPR-compliant. Privacy Policy applies.

The researcher graph. Finally searchable. Contact intelligence for the scientific workforce.
